accounts_easy.q: Which of the following is NOT one of the fundamental accounting concepts?
accounts_easy.exp: Liquidity is a financial ratio concept, not a fundamental accounting concept. The fundamental concepts include Materiality, Going Concern, and Conservatism among others.

accounts_easy.q: Trial Balance is prepared to check the accuracy of posting in ledger.
accounts_easy.exp: True. Trial Balance is prepared to check whether the total debit balances equal total credit balances, ensuring accuracy of ledger posting.
Assets = Liabilities + Capital (or Equity) is the fundamental accounting equation that forms the basis of all accounting records.

laws_medium.q: Which of the following best describes 'Consideration' under Indian Contract Act?
opts: A) Thought given to the other party
B) Something of value given by both parties
C) A promise made by one party
D) The time taken to decide
laws_medium.exp: Consideration is something of value (money, goods, services, or forbearance) given by one party and received by the other as part of the contract exchange.

laws_medium.q: An agreement made without consideration is always void.
laws_medium.exp: False. Agreements without consideration may be valid in certain cases, such as gifts, charitable promises, and other exceptions mentioned in the Indian Contract Act.

maths_hard.q: If a sum of money doubles itself in 5 years at simple interest, at what rate percent per annum was it invested?
maths_hard.exp: Using SI = PRT/100, if P becomes 2P, then SI = P. So P = P×R×5/100, which gives R = 20% p.a.

maths_hard.q: The probability of getting at least one head in 3 tosses of a fair coin is 7/8.
maths_hard.exp: True. Total outcomes = 8. Only one outcome has no heads (TTT). So favorable outcomes = 7. Probability = 7/8.

economics_pyq.q: The concept of 'Elasticity of Demand' measures:
opts: A) The quantity demanded at different price levels
B) The responsiveness of demand to changes in price
C) The total demand in the market
D) The supply available at different prices
economics_pyq.exp: Elasticity of Demand measures how responsive the quantity demanded is to changes in price, expressed as a percentage change in quantity demanded divided by percentage change in price.

economics_pyq.q: During deflation, the real value of money increases while nominal value remains the same.
economics_pyq.exp: True. Deflation is a decrease in general price levels. When prices fall, each unit of money can purchase more goods and services, so its real value increases.

mcq.format: Select the correct answer from A, B, C, or D

easy.description: Basic level questions testing fundamental concepts

medium.description: Intermediate level requiring application of concepts

hard.description: Advanced level with complex scenarios and analysis

pyq.description: Previous Year Questions from actual ICAI exams
